reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on memory usage and suggested a more detailed analysis of the memory footprint changes. Requested additional information to better understand the patch's effects.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch redirects the zswap layer to use the obj_cgroup pointer stored in the zpdesc, eliminating duplicate storage and resulting in a net zero memory footprint change.
